name: Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 6
1. Boil beef bone in water to cover until the meat falls off the bone. Remove the bone.
2. You should have at least 8 cups of broth and the meat left.
3. Add rice and boil for 15 minutes.
4. Add remaining ingredients except parsley and continue boiling until the vegetables are tender, but not mushy (about 20 minutes).
5. Cut meat into bite-size pieces and keep it hot in the soup.
6. Add parsley and serve into large, deep soup dishes.
